news.title: New Phishing Campaign Targets Banking Customers via SMS
news.summary: Attackers are sending fake SMS messages impersonating major banks, directing victims to lookalike login pages designed to steal credentials and OTPs.

news.title: Critical Zero-Day Found in Popular VPN Software
news.summary: Security researchers disclosed a critical remote code execution vulnerability affecting millions of VPN users worldwide. Patch immediately.

news.title: Ransomware Group Leaks 2M Records from Healthcare Provider
news.summary: A ransomware gang has published sensitive patient data after the healthcare provider refused to pay a $4M ransom demand.

news.title: Google Rolls Out Passkey Support Across All Platforms
news.summary: Google has expanded passkey authentication to all supported platforms, making passwordless login the default for new accounts.

news.title: AI-Powered Phishing Emails Now Bypass Traditional Filters
news.summary: New research shows GPT-generated phishing emails have a 60% higher click-through rate than manually crafted ones, evading most email security gateways.

news.title: CISA Issues Warning on Active Exploitation of Apache Flaw
news.summary: CISA added a critical Apache HTTP Server vulnerability to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog, urging federal agencies to patch within 48 hours.
